introSection: Wacky Mouse is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at York's Wild Kingdom in York Beach, Maine, USA. It opened on May 29, 2010 and was manufactured by Fajume.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Wacky Mouse follows the popular Wacky Worm track layout.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 6 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 24 riders.

fullText:
Wacky Mouse is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at York's Wild Kingdom in York Beach, Maine, USA. It opened on May 29, 2010 and was manufactured by Fajume.

Wacky Mouse follows the popular Wacky Worm track layout.

Single train with 6 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 24 riders.
